title: App Store Connect
html:
Apple's portal for managing iOS app metadata, TestFlight, in-app purchases, and subscriptions. The 25-citation density reflects the Brotein July–August 2025 submission grind — Yahir spent ~6 weeks navigating App Store Connect to ship Brotein Premium ($4.99/mo) with RevenueCat integration. Functions in the timeline as the friction-layer between built code and live product — every Yahir-launched iOS app passes through here.

TL;DR

  • 25 inbound citations, almost entirely from a tight Jul 27 → Aug 25 2025 sprint wiring Brotein Premium subscription.
  • Brotein Premium spec: Reference Name "Brotein Premium", Apple ID 6749212117, Monthly + Yearly tiers, Family Sharing enabled, in-app purchase key for RevenueCat.
  • Hit two recurring validation errors during submission: "reference name already used" and "Missing Metadata".
  • Pairs tightly with TestFlight (build distribution), RevenueCat (subscription orchestration), Xcode (build pipeline), SwiftUI (the UI layer).
  • The submission-grind cluster is captured almost entirely as Tier-1 micro screenshot summaries — Yahir was capturing-not-reflecting because the work was procedural.

Key facts

  • Brotein Premium config. Reference Name + Apple ID + tier setup all documented across 2025 07 27 screenshot 2025 07 27 at 2 02 52 pm 11e3a138, 2025 07 27 screenshot 2025 07 27 at 7 35 21 pm afce00b1, 2025 07 31 screenshot 2025 07 31 at 1 10 13 pm 6d214010, 2025 07 31 screenshot 2025 07 31 at 2 30 01 pm c5477bb4, 2025 07 31 screenshot 2025 07 31 at 4 33 48 pm 3c7a2d7b, 2025 07 31 screenshot 2025 07 31 at 4 39 58 pm e053624c.
  • Validation pain dates. 2025 08 02 screenshot 2025 08 02 at 10 26 58 am 72798101 / 2025 08 02 screenshot 2025 08 02 at 7 21 27 pm dec111ec / 2025 08 02 screenshot 2025 08 02 at 7 21 41 pm 1bf19cfb capture the validation error chain.
  • Family Sharing decision. Documented in the Aug 9 → Aug 16 cluster.
  • Trademark-claim adjacency. trademark claim surfaces in the same workflow.
  • Subscription monetization framework. subscription monetization concept built primarily from this grind.
  • Earliest reference. 2025 05 20 screenshot 2025 05 20 at 7 58 12 am 858c94d0 — early UI screenshot prefiguring submission needs.

Chronological arc (the Brotein submission sprint)

  • Jul 27 — initial subscription setup, Reference Name conflicts.
  • Jul 31 — multiple Apple ID + tier configurations attempted.
  • Aug 2 — peak validation-error friction.
  • Aug 8 → Aug 16 — Family Sharing + metadata fixes.
  • Aug 25 — final submission cluster.

  • 2025 07 27 screenshot 2025 07 27 at 2 02 52 pm 11e3a138 — sprint kickoff
  • 2025 07 31 screenshot 2025 07 31 at 4 33 48 pm 3c7a2d7b

Plus ~11 additional screenshots from the same sprint.

Connections

  • testflight · revenuecat · xcode · swiftui — iOS shipping toolchain
  • brotein — the project this powered
  • bromenu · outpace · swipr — sibling apps that will use the same pipeline
  • subscription monetization · trademark claim — concepts forged here
  • apple design award — the polish-bar adjacent target
  • ios — platform context
